creator: wahjava@gmail.com
text:
On Fri, Jan 30, 2009 at 10:40 AM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of x11/hs-x11-xft-ghc,
>
> Please note that PR ports/131135 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/131135

I'm approving this update. So, please commit it.

Thanks
-- 
Ashish SHUKLA
